plans.title: V1.21 Local Platform Isolation — crate split, daemon API cleanup, cloud-sync extraction
plans.notes: Batches A–E ✅. CLI wired to cloud-sync directly. Pre-existing clippy error in daemon-runtime (from D batch) needs fix. Batch F remaining.

metadata.branch_policy: single integration branch — all batches merge to feature/local-daemon-platform-isolation then PR to main
metadata.description: Hard local/cloud split: rename nexus-cloud-sync, split nexus-domain, remove daemon sync/registration routes, CLI cloud-line wiring.

batches.name: A — nexus-cloud-sync rename
batches.notes: 2026-05-20: 5 commits (1838ee5..11bf194); legacy-sync feature gates 6 modules; all tests + clippy green

batches.name: B — domain crate split
batches.notes: B1–B7 ✅ (012b742..3654b67). B8 finish via C batch (405d908): nexus-domain fully removed; degradation/runtime_guard/runtime_mode → nexus42/domain + nexus-creator. B9 → final QC.

batches.name: C — moment-context-assembly
batches.notes: 2026-05-21: 3 commits (4787e66..e63611a). nexus-moment-context-assembly scaffolded with cloud-stage feature; context_assembly extracted from nexus-domain + daemon.

batches.name: D — daemon isolation
batches.notes: 2026-05-21: 4 commits (b19bba2..a33d7e7). Daemon has zero cloud deps. Sync routes, registration proxy, SyncSubsystem, outbox removed. All 38 remaining routes verified against allowed families.

batches.name: E — CLI cloud-line wiring
batches.notes: 2026-05-21: 3 commits (5e5f3d4..50f444f). CLI sync/register/verify wired to nexus-cloud-sync directly. Zero stale daemon sync callers. legacy-sync feature enabled on CLI binary.

batches.name: G — schemas layout & READMEs
batches.notes: 2026-05-20: cloud-sync/ rename, meta/ removed; specs/plan/compass/tooling docs synced; layout §7 inventory

metadata.next_action: Fix clippy error in nexus-daemon-runtime, then execute Batch F (stubs, tests, docs).

cross_cutting.title: rand 0.7.3 cannot be upgraded — blocked by wiremock → http-types upstream
cross_cutting.note: Blocked by wiremock → http-types upstream. Removed from V1.6 scope per V1.6 delivery compass decision.
